creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


You have deleted way too much for the PR to be of any use at all.  How 
in the world are we supposed to debug a "missing include file" problem 
without even the cc command line??? 

Also, there are many things you can do before you send in a report 
like this.  Say, is the Xlib.h file in /usr/X11R6/include/X11?  What 
did configure say about the X include files?  Did configure complain 
about anything? 

Besides, you didn't even say what your X version is.  Sorry for being 
harsh, but for a person as experienced as you are, I expect much more.
